{{CargoRelic
|name=Madame Bovary
|class_id=21335
|rank=SSS
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Flaubert’s realist masterpiece tells of Emma, a farmer’s wife consumed by romantic fantasy. Trapped in debt and infidelity, she spirals into ruin. With surgical prose, Flaubert exposed the spiritual void of 19th-century provincial France. The novel, once tried for immorality, became a landmark of psychological realism.
|fame=72
|art=71
|fth=57
|civ=106
|tech=56
|ss1=Angel Minion RUSH +3%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +360<br>Per Angel Form Tier, Snail RUSH +15<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Angel Minion RUSH +4%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +480<br>Per Angel Form Tier, Snail RUSH +20<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Angel Minion RUSH +5%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +600<br>Per Angel Form Tier, Snail RUSH +25<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss4=Angel Minion RUSH +7%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +840<br>Per Angel Form Tier, Snail RUSH +35<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss5=Angel Minion RUSH +9%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +1080<br>Per Angel Form Tier, Snail RUSH +45<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss6=Angel Minion RUSH +12%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +1440<br>Per Angel Form Tier, Snail RUSH +60<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss7=Angel Minion RUSH +12%<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +1440<br>Per Angel Form Tier, Snail RUSH +60<br>Angel Form Tiers: 9/9<br>Per 60 T8+ Minions deployed, Troop HP +1200 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Dragon Orb Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Orange Card Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's CIV +15
}}
